title: AN ACT CREATING THE BARRIO OF SIKO IN LIPA CITY

chunks.text:
H. No. 15427 / 65 OG No. 9, 2055 (March 3, 1969)

[ REPUBLIC ACT NO. 5001, June 17, 1967 ]

AN ACT CREATING THE BARRIO OF SIKO IN LIPA CITY

Be it enacted by the Senate and House of Representatives of the Philippines in Congress assembled:

SECTION 1. The sitio of Siko in the barrio of Tambo, Lipa City, is hereby separated from said barrio, and converted into a distinct and independent barrio of said city, to be known as the barrio of Siko.

SEC. 2. This Act shall take effect upon its approval.

Enacted without Executive approval, June 17, 1967.
